message:
🌱 helm: Install chart from registry (#906)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "helm-6982-install-chart-from-registry",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "helm: Install chart from registry",
+    "description": "Install chart from registry. Requested by 66+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current helm deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your helm version and configuration:\n```bash\nhelm list --all-namespaces 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working helm installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review helm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant helm configuration:\n```bash\nhelm version\n```\nHi dream team community!\n\nThis is a little feature request: **Install chart from registry**\n\n## Before\n\n```\nhelm registry login\nhelm chart pull ...\nhelm chart export ... ./charts\nhelm install ..."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Install chart from registry",
+        "description": "Hello,\n\nI currently work on this issue ; https://github.com/helm/helm/issues/6982\n\nStatus: Work in progress\nTime estimated: ~2 weeks\n```yaml\nhelm install gcr.io/my-project/my-chart@sha256:xxx --from-registry\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nhelm version\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Install chart from registry\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Hello,\n\nI currently work on this issue ; https://github.com/helm/helm/issues/6982\n\nStatus: Work in progress\nTime estimated: ~2 weeks",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "helm install gcr.io/my-project/my-chart@sha256:xxx --from-registry",
+        "helm chart install my-chart@sha256:xxx",
+        "helm upgrade \\\n  some-name \\\n  oci@some.regist.ry/some-chart \\\n  --username my-user \\\n  --password my-password \\\n  --install \\\n  --set some-key=some-value \\\n  --namespace some-namespace \\\n  --wait"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
